sentence: 他第一次来港就爱上了这里的美食。
pinyin: Tā dì yī cì lái Gǎng jiù àishàng le zhèlǐ de měishí.
english: He fell in love with the food here on his first visit to Hong Kong.

sentence: 打牌的时候他当庄家，赢了不少钱。
pinyin: Dǎ pái de shíhou tā dāng zhuāngjia, yíng le bù shǎo qián.
english: He was the banker when they played cards and won quite a bit of money.
The team smoothly advanced into the final.

sentence: 公司已经制定了应急预案。
pinyin: Gōngsī yǐjīng zhìdìng le yìngjí yù'àn.
english: The company has already formulated an emergency contingency plan.

sentence: 欢迎各位到访我们的展厅。
pinyin: Huānyíng gèwèi dàofǎng wǒmen de zhǎntīng.
english: Welcome to all who are visiting our showroom.
